chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-365 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-2372/2026 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on MA-2373/2026 4. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2026 Mr. Meer Ahmed Mangrio, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Dilber son of Balach seeks protective bail in FIR No.07 of 2026 registered at P.S Khanoth for offences under Sections 302, 324, 337-A(i), 337-F(i), 147, 148, 149, 34, PPC. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; that the applicant being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, he apprehends that before reaching trial Court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of five days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days i.e. 28.03.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Shahid
